message:
🐛 Persist cluster version cache across page refreshes (#784)

The upgrade status card used an in-memory module-level cache for cluster
versions, which was lost on every page refresh causing all clusters to
show "loading..." again.

Now persists the version cache to localStorage with debounced writes and
uses stale-while-revalidate: shows cached versions immediately on page
load while fetching fresh data in the background.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
